en: The teacher is here.

ab: Aka to pisalama, Kalikien a maro’ i ’adengang.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: Sakalima a lipay anini, pahanhan anocila, malacafay kita a misalama!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，我們一起去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Sakatolo a lipay anocila, misalama kita to nanom i helek no lahok anocila!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩水吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Pa’aliwacan anodafak,malacafay kako ato ciina tayra i kiwkay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: Sakaota’aw sanay kako, tayra ho kako i kamisi’an.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.

ab: Hinefa han ho iso a pahanhan.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: Singsi, adada ko tiyad ako, tayla ho kako i kamisi’an.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，我先去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: Manga’ay kako a minanaw to kamay haw?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: O mamipahanhan to, honisato a tayra.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Singsi, adada ko tangal ako, mihifang to helek no lahok.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Singsi, mihifang kako anocila to sakacecay a lipay, paising ho kako.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Panay?

ab: Adada ko tiyad ningra, ira cingra i kamisi’an.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kacaw?

ab: Singsi, adada ko takolaw ni Kacaw, mihifangay anini.
en: Teacher, Kacaw has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Mana awa ci Panay a tayni saw?
en: Why didn’t Panay come?
She has a fever.
